input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.4.2
            TITLE: missing energy meter data due to the team’s fault, tampering, or attempting to tamper with

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.4.2: Missing Energy Meter data due to the team’s fault, tampering, or attempting to tamper with
EV.3.4.2 Missing Energy Meter data due to the team’s fault, tampering, or attempting to tamper with 
the Energy Meter will be treated as a Violation.

final_answer: rule EV.3.4.2: Missing Energy Meter data due to the team’s fault, tampering, or attempting to tamper with the Energy Meter will be treated as a Violation.
